Interface ConverterBuilder.ConverterAware

All Superinterfaces:
ConverterBuilder, ConverterBuilder.ReadingConverterAware, ConverterBuilder.WritingConverterAware
Enclosing interface:
ConverterBuilder
public static interface ConverterBuilder.ConverterAware extends ConverterBuilder, ConverterBuilder.ReadingConverterAware, ConverterBuilder.WritingConverterAware
A ConverterBuilder aware of both a reading and writing converter.
Since:
2.0
Author:
Oliver Gierke
